message:
fix: address code review issues in notification components and OpenAPI

Bug fixes discovered during code review:
- NotificationItem: Change <output> to <span aria-hidden="true"> for
  decorative unread indicator (semantic HTML fix)
- NotificationItem: Add type="button" to motion.button dismiss button
  to prevent form submission in form contexts
- NotificationList: Add `relative` class to filter button for proper
  absolute positioning of the filter count badge
- generate-openapi: Add securitySchemes definition to OpenAPI spec
  (required for bearerAuth reference to be valid)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
